case_title: LETICIA CISNERORS VS. JOSE UC MIS

docket_entries.description: ORDER DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF LETICIAS CISNEROS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE UC MIS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY CISNERORS, LETICIA AS TO DEFENDANT UC MIS, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
